name: Dark Basemap
description: Dark-themed OpenStreetMap basemap designed for high-contrast thematic overlays.

metadata.label: Dark Basemap
metadata.constraints: visual dark mode semantics mapped to OSM fallback tiles
metadata.human_summary: Dark visual style that improves readability of bright overlays such as traffic, heat, or event layers.
search_examples: show traffic on a dark map in Berlin
view fire overlay with dark basemap
disambiguation_notes: Choose this when the user emphasizes overlay visibility or dark style aesthetics.
metadata.location_dependency: Location-specific but globally usable for map rendering.
